text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Is this a new lipstick from your line? Think I'll try
it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's not my product, just something I did an ad for. It's a tint with a half matte finish. Thought it'd suit your tastes.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whooa... But what if you want a super glossy
look? ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, maybe this new product would work
for you, Falco. It's waterproof, which means it
won't sweat off. And it stands out from
afar—that's a plus if you're on stage.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so all this makeup has City's mark of
approv'l? Wear'n these'll make me more like a
city girl?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yukino's eyes are so sparkly! ♪ I want to sparkle
like that, too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: City, I need you to make us super duper cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...You know, Curren, I really admire how you can
do that so effortlessly. Makes me jealous.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But sure, I'll find something. What kind of
occasion do you two want lipstick for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume continue to fill the cosmetic
shop with their lively chatter.
